key_excerpts.text: # Finnish AI startup ConfidentialMind raises €1.5M in a pre-seed funding. ConfidentialMind, an Espoo-based generative AI software startup has raised €1.5 million in a pre-seed funding round to revolutionize how enterprises and governments deploy generative AI applications. The funding round was led by Failup Ventures, with participation from Angel CoFund. * Founded in 2023 by Markku Räsänen (CEO), Severi Tikkala (CTO), and Esko Vähämäki (Chief Architect), ConfidentialMind is a startup building a generative AI platf
